# Daily Report — 2026-05-29

## Task Completed
Added `list_cmdb_ci_outages` tool targeting the `cmdb_ci_outage` table. Supports filtering by
affected CI (`ci_sys_id`), outage type, resolved state (true/false), and begin-date range
(`begin_after` / `begin_before`) with datetime validation. Reference fields (`cmdb_ci`,
`cause_ci`) are normalised to their `value` sys_id. Full pagination support via
`has_more` / `next_offset`. Registered in `system_administrator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1285
- Coverage: 91%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level package advisories only (setuptools, urllib3, pyjwt, wheel) — unchanged baseline,
no project dependency vulnerabilities.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — registered params + tool function

- `tests/test_cmdb_ci_outage_tools.py` — 21 new tests (100% coverage of new code)
- `.github/DAILY_BACKLOG.md` — moved item to Completed
